svg.text: StreetToSweet Dog Shelter Management System - Workflow Diagram
1. Users register and login based on their role (Public, Admin, Driver, Vet)
2. Public users report stray dogs, browse adoptable dogs, donate, and volunteer
3. Admins verify reports, assign rescue drivers, register dogs, and approve adoptions
4. Rescue drivers receive assignments and transport dogs to shelter
5. Veterinarians assess health, administer treatment, and update records
6. Healthy dogs are marked as available for adoption
7. Public users submit adoption requests and receive certificates
8. System sends automated notifications for all key events
9. Admins organize events, manage volunteers, and monitor activities
10. System generates reports and maintains all records
11. Process ends when all workflows are completed and data is secured
Dashed lines indicate data flow between different user roles
